skills.description: Scrapes content based on a preset URL list, filters high-quality technical information, and generates daily Markdown reports.
trigger_conditions: Daily generation of technical news reports
Need for up-to-date technical content aggregation

skills.description: The X (Twitter) Scraper skill provides access to Twitter data through the Xquik platform, allowing users to search for tweets, look up user profiles, extract engagement metrics, and perform bulk extractions using REST API or MCP server.
trigger_conditions: User needs to search X/Twitter for tweets by keyword
User wants to look up a user profile (bio
User needs engagement metrics for a specific tweet (likes
User wants to check if one account follows another
anti_triggers: User is looking for Facebook data
